name: OrangeHRM Dashboard Tests
description:
As a logged-in user
  I want to navigate to different modules from the dashboard
  So that I can access various features of the application

elements.name: Verify user can access dashboard after login

steps.name: User is logged in to OrangeHRM application
Dashboard title should be displayed

elements.name: Verify user can logout from the application

steps.name: User is logged in to OrangeHRM application
User clicks on user dropdown and logout
User should be logged out and redirected to login page

name: OrangeHRM Login Tests
description:
As a user
  I want to login to OrangeHRM application
  So that I can access the dashboard and other modules

steps.name: User is on the OrangeHRM login page

elements.name: Verify user can login with valid credentials

steps.name: User enters valid username "Admin" and password "admin123"
User clicks the login button
User should be redirected to the dashboard
Dashboard title should be displayed

result.error_message:

	at ✽.Dashboard title should be displayed(file:///G:/New%20folder/Workspace/OrangeHRMS/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:14)
